race.comment: She's got topweight against the boys but PRICE TAG (1) looks like the type of filly who will contest better races than this. She's always had a bit of a boom being very well bred for top connections, sent out $1.65 first up at Cranbourne and doing enough to get the job done. Fancy she'll come on plenty from that and she draws ideally. I'M FOXING (3) has won two on the bounce and looks progressive. Harder here and drawn wide but she can figure again. DOUBTLAND DIVA (6) won well in a Class 1 at Pakenham last time in solid figures despite going around $15. Have to respect now. BLONDIE'S AWARD (9) won her maiden easily when last seen and has claims off that.
